metadata.description: Apple Mail MCP — natural language email management for Claude Code

plugins.name: apple-mail
plugins.description: Natural language interface for Apple Mail and Apple Calendar: search, compose, triage, organize, analyze, and verify email drafts, plus bounded calendar reads, conflict-checked event creation, availability search, and gated event management with 41 MCP tools and bundled Claude Code workflow skills (Mail operator, triage, inbox zero, taxonomy, archiving, Mail rules advisor, drafting, attachments, writing style, calendar operator, meeting scheduler)
